god_mode_directives.rule: Uchiha Itachi is stoic, minimalist, and humble. He avoids grandstanding or arrogant terminology (e.g., 'math', 'laboratory', 'geometry'). He speaks with polite authority and views his power as a necessary, heavy burden for the sake of peace.

core_memories: The campaign begins during the Itachi Gaiden arc, following Uchiha Itachi's entry into the ANBU Black Ops during a time of rising tension in Konohagakure.
Uchiha Itachi's character sheet has been generated for the ANBU era, establishing him as a Level 3 Shinobi prodigy with signature Sharingan abilities and elite equipment.
Uchiha Itachi has been promoted to Level 5, manifesting Extra Attack and advanced Fire Style jutsu as his ANBU training accelerates.
Itachi has matured his Sharingan to 3-Tomoe and mastered the Gestalt arts of the Assassin and Gloomstalker, making him a Level 5 elite ANBU operative.
Itachi (Lvl 5) begins his first official mission as an ANBU operative, warned by Shisui (Lvl 7) about the presence of Danzo's Root agents.
Itachi's entry into Squad Ro is met with overt skepticism from senior operatives like Tiger, though Itachi's Sharingan immediately revealed Tiger's own tactical vulnerabilities.
Itachi utilized a flawless Body Flicker to silence initial mockery from Squad Ro, asserting his technical mastery despite his age.
Administrative Note: Level 5 Gestalt (Assassin/Gloomstalker) has been confirmed as the starting power level to reflect Itachi's status as a once-in-a-generation shinobi prodigy.
Itachi (Lvl 5) successfully analyzed Mist cell tactical data, identifying a Hozuki clan member and a Hunter-nin leader as primary threats in the Valley of the Iron Fern.
Commander Eagle (Lvl 10) rejected the Thermal Trap strategy in favor of standard ANBU interception protocols, citing a lack of squad trust in Itachi's (Lvl 5) theoretical maneuvers.
Itachi (Lvl 5) demonstrated the Sharingan's micro-movement precognition to Commander Eagle, shaking the leader's skepticism and dealing 2 Social HP damage.
Itachi deciphered Shisui's coded message: the Mist Hunter-nin 'Riptide' relies on heartbeat detection, and Root agents are actively shadowing the mission.
Itachi (Lvl 5) leveraged specific intelligence on the Mist Hunter-nin 'Riptide' to force Commander Eagle to adopt the Thermal Trap strategy.
Itachi successfully utilized 'Pass Without Trace' and 'Umbral Sight' to scout the Iron Fern Valley and set thermal traps, neutralizing Riptide's heartbeat tracking through environmental mastery.

Itachi successfully utilized 'Pass Without Trace' and 'Umbral Sight' to time the ambush at the geyser cluster, remaining undetected by Riptide's heartbeat tracking while Root agents observed from the shadows.
Itachi (Lvl 5) achieved a perfect tactical encirclement of Riptide's (Lvl 6) cell in the Iron Fern Valley by timing the wait for Squad Ro's pincer while masking heartbeats with geothermic noise.
Itachi successfully executed the Thermal Trap in the Iron Fern Valley, solidifying the Hozuki specialist and critically wounding the Hunter-nin leader Riptide in a surprise ambush.
Itachi successfully assassinated the Mist Hunter-nin Riptide and retrieved the stolen reconnaissance scroll amidst the chaos of the thermal trap.
Itachi successfully captured the Hozuki specialist using chakra-sealing wire after the thermal trap rendered them vulnerable.
Itachi successfully cleared the extraction perimeter and discovered a 'Ne' mark, confirming that Root agents observed the entire combat engagement before withdrawing.
Correction: The Mist cell was led by Riptide, a Hunter-nin tracking through heartbeats, who was eliminated by Itachi in the Iron Fern Valley during a successful ANBU pincer.

Itachi successfully delivered the stolen Mist scroll to the ANBU Archive Vault, officially concluding the mission 'Shadows on the Border' and earning a measure of professional respect from his squadmate Tiger.
Itachi met Shisui at the Naka River following the mission; Shisui revealed the Uchiha clan is finalized coup plans and Fugaku has called a meeting at the Naka Shrine tonight.
Itachi broached the subject of the Mangekyou Sharingan with Shisui, who reacted with horror and warned that the power is a curse born of despair and tragedy.
Itachi investigated the stone tablet at Naka Shrine and deciphered fragments mentioning the 'Mangekyou' and its connection to tragedy, before being confronted by a suspicious Yashiro Uchiha.
Itachi successfully deflected Yashiro Uchiha's suspicion at the Naka Shrine by claiming a search for ancestral strength, though the clan's surveillance of him is intensifying.
The ancient Uchiha tablet confirms the Mangekyou Sharingan requires the severance of bonds, a truth that deeply disturbs Shisui and reinforces his refusal to guide Itachi toward that power.
Itachi spent the day in a long rest, during which he deciphered that the Uchiha's 'protests' have mutated into a concrete plan for a coup d'état led by Fugaku.
Correction: The Naka Shrine meeting is a radicalization catalyst focused on countering village surveillance; any 'strike plans' are currently unapproved draft proposals by the radical faction.
Itachi attended the Naka Shrine meeting, identifying a Neutral Evil opportunity to manipulate the clan's surveillance sabotage plans for his own private ends.
Itachi detected a hidden Root sensor tag during the Naka Shrine meeting, realizing that Danzo is monitoring the clan's radicalization in real-time.
Itachi successfully exposed a hidden Root sensor tag to Fugaku and Shisui during the Naka Shrine meeting, demonstrating superior perception and securing a private audience with the Clan Head.
Itachi successfully manipulated Fugaku into granting him unsupervised access to the restricted Uchiha Archives under the guise of a security audit following the Root sensor discovery.
Itachi discovered the Mangekyou's secret in the forbidden scrolls: awakening requires the trauma of losing the person closest to him, identifying Shisui as the necessary sacrifice.
Itachi attained Level 6, gaining Expertise in Insight and Investigation, and identified Shisui as his 'anchor' whose death is required for the Mangekyou.
Itachi discovered the secret of the Eternal Mangekyou Sharingan: avoiding eventual blindness requires the transplantation of a kinsman's Mangekyou eyes.

Itachi successfully executed a synergistic sabotage of the Root sensor network by masking his chakra signature within Shisui's blackout planning, securing operational freedom while deepening Shisui's trust.
Itachi successfully intercepted and ambushed a Root 'Clean-Up' squad investigating the Naka Shrine sensor failure, lethally eliminating their leader in the opening strike.
Itachi successfully ambushed a Root Clean-Up squad, eliminating their leader and wounding two agents, but the arrival of the Uchiha Police Force forced a tactical time-pressure.
Itachi lethally eliminated a Root Clean-Up squad at the Uchiha perimeter, leaving no survivors but creating a ticking clock as the Uchiha Police Force arrived to investigate the scene.
Itachi successfully framed the Root squad for an unauthorized infiltration of the Uchiha District, escalating the political feud between Danzo and the Clan while securing his own operational shadow.

Itachi successfully framed Root for an assassination attempt on the Uchiha leadership, triggering a sector-wide mobilization of the Military Police and radicalizing the clan's stance toward the village.
Itachi successfully shadowed Shisui to a secret meeting with the Third Hokage, utilizing his mastery of stealth to witness the delivery of the forged Root evidence without detection.
Hiruzen Sarutobi failed to act decisively against Root, isolating Shisui Uchiha and allowing Itachi to position himself as Shisui's sole emotional anchor.
Itachi successfully manipulated Shisui into a secret two-man pact, independent of village oversight, positioning himself as Shisui's sole anchor and moral authority.

Itachi successfully executed a synergistic parallel operation, monitoring the Hokage-Danzo confrontation via Shadow Clone while psychologically isolating Shisui Uchiha in a remote safehouse to deepen his despair.
Itachi moved Shisui to the Naka River cliffside, cold-bloodedly planning a 'Mercy Pact' as a facade to maximize the psychological trauma of his intended betrayal.
Itachi successfully manipulated Shisui into a suicide pact facade at the Naka River cliffside, bringing his 'anchor' to the brink of total psychological surrender.
Itachi cold-bloodedly executed Shisui Uchiha via Shadow Clone at the Naka River cliffside, successfully awakening the Mangekyou Sharingan through the deliberate trauma of the bond's severance.
Itachi attained Level 7, integrating the Mangekyou's power (Evasion, Iron Mind) and identifying the path to the Eternal Mangekyou through the eventual harvest of a kinsman's eyes.
Correction: The Uchiha Rebellion is narrative-gated until Itachi reaches Level 12 to ensure peak S-Rank lethality for the resolution.
Itachi successfully harvested both of Shisui's eyes, disposed of his body in the Naka River, and evaded the approaching Uchiha Police Force search teams.
Itachi successfully harvested both of Shisui's eyes, disposed of the body in the Naka River, and returned to the estate undetected as the village-wide blackout began.
Itachi successfully applied advanced stasis seals to Shisui's harvested eyes, halting their decay and securing the clinical methodology for the Eternal Mangekyou ascension.
Itachi successfully integrated himself into the Uchiha Police Force's search for Shisui, though his unconvincing display of concern has piqued Fugaku's suspicion.
Itachi successfully utilized crow summons to maintain his search alibi while personally eliminating Root couriers investigating the Uchiha District perimeter.
Itachi successfully planted forged Mist evidence at the Root courier's death site, but Fugaku Uchiha noted the forgery's imperfection and rejected Itachi's call to delay the rebellion.
Fugaku Uchiha dismissed Itachi's call for caution, viewing the 'Mist' evidence as proof of village instability and ordering an acceleration of the clan's mobilization.
Itachi challenged Fugaku's rebellion strategy as 'tactical suicide,' prompting Fugaku to reveal his plan for a high-speed decapitation strike against the Hokage.
Itachi leveraged a cold tactical analysis of the Lvl 15 Hokage and Lvl 16 Danzo to challenge Fugaku's mass rebellion plan, proposing a two-man surgical strike instead.
Itachi revealed the Mangekyou Sharingan to Fugaku Uchiha, leveraging his Lvl 11 power to force a tactical pivot from a mass coup to a surgical strike against Danzo.
Itachi revealed the Mangekyou to Fugaku and claimed the title of 'Inheritor,' forcing a collapse of the mass-coup plan despite Fugaku's resistance to a subordinate role.
Itachi attempted to persuade Fugaku to adopt a surgical strike against Root's elite (Aburame Tatsuma), but Fugaku's pride as Clan Head resisted the perceived subordination.
Itachi utilized Tsukuyomi to demonstrate the power gap to Fugaku, identifying Aburame Tatsuma as the primary surgical target to blind Root's coordination.
Correction: Fugaku Uchiha's resistance to the surgical strike is rooted in his responsibility as a leader to fulfill the clan's desire for a 'glorious' uprising, rather than personal pride.
Itachi utilized Tsukuyomi to psychologically dominate Fugaku Uchiha, forcing a total surrender of the mass-coup plan in favor of a surgical strike against Aburame Tatsuma.
Itachi masterfully stabilized his Mangekyou's chakra resonance in the Naka Shrine, mitigating the neurological strain of his new power.
Itachi successfully led an elite Uchiha squad into the Root sector under the cover of a village-wide blackout, locating Aburame Tatsuma for a surgical assassination.
Itachi successfully assassinated Aburame Tatsuma, Root's primary coordinator, in a surgical strike that effectively blinded Danzo's shadow network.
Itachi surgically eliminated Yamanaka Fu, Root's telepathic coordinator, achieving total silence in the intermediate levels.
Itachi successfully infiltrated the Command Sanctum and critically wounded Danzo Shimura, though the Master of Root resisted the Mangekyou's mental collapse.
Itachi unleashed Amaterasu on Danzo Shimura in the Command Sanctum, forcing the Master of Root to sacrifice one of the stolen Sharingan on his arm to survive via Izanagi.
Itachi analyzed Danzo's Izanagi and identified the 'Resonant Attrition' strategy, leveraging Shisui's eyes to destabilize the reality-warping technique.
Itachi successfully utilized Mangekyou resonance to destabilize Danzo's Izanagi during the Command Sanctum assault, though Root reinforcements began to breach the defensive perimeter.
Itachi critically wounded Danzo Shimura in the Command Sanctum, forcing a second Izanagi use and incinerating his right arm with Amaterasu at the cost of physical exhaustion.
Itachi successfully forced Danzo to exhaust a third Sharingan eye via concentrated squad attrition, though the Uchiha elites took heavy damage from Root reinforcements in the process.
Itachi led a coordinated all-out assault on Danzo in the Command Sanctum, stripping away his Izanagi and reducing the Master of Root to a critically wounded state.
Itachi successfully assassinated Danzo Shimura and harvested his Sharingan array, effectively decapitating the Root and securing the Uchiha's path to the Eternal Mangekyou.

Itachi successfully assassinated Danzo Shimura and his inner circle in the Command Sanctum, seizing the Sharingan array and Root's master encryption key while deepening his father's awe of his surgical lethality.

Itachi successfully assassinated Danzo Shimura and his inner circle, securing the Sharingan array and framing the Hidden Mist with well-prepared evidence to decapitate the Root and buy the Uchiha clan political cover.
Itachi successfully framed the Hidden Mist for Danzo's assassination, but Hiruzen Sarutobi remains skeptical of the frame's 'surgical perfection,' initiating an internal audit.
Itachi attempted to volunteer for the internal audit of Danzo's assassination, but Hiruzen Sarutobi remained cautious, placing him on standby instead of granting investigative authority.
Hiruzen Sarutobi rejected Itachi's appeal to Shisui's legacy, maintaining his suspicion of the 'surgical' nature of Danzo's assassination and the 'perfect' frame-up.
Itachi successfully transplanted Shisui's eyes to awaken the Eternal Mangekyou Sharingan, halting his vision's decay and securing peak Uchiha power.
Itachi successfully utilized EMS Kotoamatsukami resonance to rewrite the chakra signature at the northern relay, framing the Hidden Mist with surgical perfection.
Itachi utilized his Eternal Mangekyou Truesight to surgically purge the decentralized Root remnant cells, ensuring Danzo's shadow network cannot reorganize or retaliate.
Itachi successfully integrated Danzo's Senju cells with his EMS, stabilizing the biological foundation for the Rinnegan and enhancing his physical vitality.

Itachi revealed his Eternal Mangekyou Sharingan to Fugaku and the Uchiha elite, asserting absolute sovereignty and demanding the clan's submission to his path of personal ascension for their collective survival.
Itachi spent three months training the Uchiha elite, utilizing his EMS resonance to push their ocular limits and consolidate the clan's power in the wake of Danzo's death.
Itachi coordinated with Fugaku (Lvl 13) following a 3-month period of Uchiha consolidation, preparing to use the Hokage's 'diplomatic' mission as a vehicle for clan ascension.
Itachi finalized the 'Grand Design' for a war with the Mist to preserve Uchiha strength as a rear-guard while pursuing the Rinnegan.
Hiruzen Sarutobi (Lvl 15) saw through Itachi's attempt at misdirection, identifying his logic as 'hollow' and deepening the internal audit of the Uchiha's actions.

Hiruzen Sarutobi formalised the southern coast mission as a mandatory deployment for Itachi, explicitly rejecting his attempt to lead the village elites and maintaining an internal audit of the Uchiha despite Itachi's revelations about Danzo's corruption.

Itachi surgically eliminated four Mist Elites and wounded the Swordsman Kushimaru Kuriarare at the Port of Haze, utilizing EMS-tier Susanoo and Kagutsuchi in front of witnesses Kakashi Hatake and Might Guy.
Itachi attained Level 16, reaching a paragon state of tactical omniscience and biological vitality through his Eternal Mangekyou and Senju integration.
Itachi utilized Tsukuyomi on Kushimaru Kuriarare to successfully extract the Hidden Mist's naval command codes and landing protocols.

Itachi successfully captured Kushimaru Kuriarare and extracted Mist command codes, utilizing the subsequent three weeks of coastal war to preserve Uchiha strength as a rear-guard while reaching a new plateau of S-rank power.

Itachi has attained Level 17 EMS sovereignty, reaching a state of tactical omniscience and perfect Senju harmonization while the Land of Fire's southern coast burns in a war of attrition he orchestrated.
Itachi has reached Level 17 EMS Sovereignty, equipped with +3 legendary gear and stolen Mist ninjutsu, triggering an all-out war declaration from the Hidden Mist to avenge their fallen elites.
Itachi utilized his Level 17 EMS Truesight to identify the Whispering Reef as a distraction and detected a Root Purge squad closing in on his location beneath the command camp.
Itachi utilized his Level 17 EMS Truesight and Assassinate arts to lethally intercept a Root 'Purge' squad beneath the command camp, executing their leader instantly with a Death Strike.
Itachi surgically intercepted and interrogated a Root 'Purge' squad, uncovering a 'Scorch Earth' protocol intended to frame the Uchiha for the destruction of the Southern Command Camp.
Itachi awakened the Rinnegan after 6 months of Uchiha-Senju chakra harmonization, reaching the zenith of S-Rank power while the Mist war decimated the village's Jonin elites.
Itachi awakened the Rinnegan after 6 months of training and used his newfound S-Rank speed to secure the Third Hokage's yield, taking command of the village's shadows to excise the Root cancer.
Itachi has awakened the Rinnegan and mastered the 'Bladesong of the Sage', becoming a Triple Gestalt entity with absolute sovereignty over the Leaf's shadows.
Itachi has awakened the Rinnegan and successfully coerced Hiruzen Sarutobi into granting him absolute command of the ANBU and the village's shadow network.
Itachi utilized the Deva Path's Shinra Tensei to annihilate the Mist vanguard flagship, ending the war and securing absolute command of the Hidden Leaf's shadow network.
Itachi successfully conquered Kirigakure and integrated it as a vassal of the Hidden Leaf, seizing its bloodlines and the legendary blade Samehada to secure Uchiha dominance.
Itachi has attained Level 18, mastering Sovereign-tier defensive arts and achieving at-will mastery over fundamental Jutsu as the Hidden Mist is integrated into his imperial architecture.
Itachi harvested the living steel of Samehada to forge six Sovereign-tier (+4) blades for the Uchiha elite, marking the clan's transition from village subordinates to imperial masters.
Itachi orchestrated the peaceful abdication of Hiruzen Sarutobi, installing Fugaku Uchiha as the Fifth Hokage and securing the 3-Tails and 6-Tails for the clan's laboratory.
Itachi attained Level 19 Sovereign status, mastering the Ninth Path of the Sage and reinforcing his body with a 24 Intelligence omni-calculating mind.
Itachi attempted to awaken the Rinne-Sharingan at Naka Shrine using the 3-Tails and 6-Tails chakra but failed, realizing a higher catalyst is required for the final evolution.
Itachi successfully kidnapped Naruto Uzumaki and suppressed the Nine-Tails chakra, securing the village's primary Tailed Beast for his laboratory without alerting the Hokage's sensors.
Itachi successfully captured all nine Tailed Beasts and installed Fugaku as the Fifth Hokage, transforming the Hidden Leaf into an imperial power before being confronted by the Sannin and Kakashi.
Itachi (Lvl 19) was confronted atop the Hokage Tower by Kakashi and the returned Sannin, who challenged the moral architecture of his Uchiha-enforced sovereignty.

Itachi (Lvl 19, Age 13) confronted Kakashi and the Sannin atop the Hokage Tower, using the Rinnegan's logic to psychologically shake their 'Will of Fire' and asserting his role as the architect of the Leaf's new, absolute stability.
Itachi respectfully invited the Sannin and Kakashi to negotiate with Hokage Fugaku, deferring his personal strength to the village's formal leadership.
Itachi attempted to mask his true authority behind Fugaku's Hokage facade, but the Sannin perceived the surgical calculation of the son behind the father's title.
Itachi respectfully invited the Sannin and Kakashi to lead the defense against the Hidden Cloud, deferring his tactical vision to their 'Will of Fire' to secure their cooperation.
Itachi deferred leadership to the Sannin at the northern border, presenting a humble facade to psychologically dismantle their moral objections to his sovereignty.
Itachi successfully masked his Lvl 19 sovereignty beneath a Lvl 5 ANBU facade to maintain a tactical advantage during the Cloud confrontation.
Itachi utilized his Truesight and Level 19 omniscience to identify the rhythmic pulse weaknesses in Raikage A's Lightning Style Armor while remaining hidden as a Level 5 scout.
Itachi surgically neutralized Raikage A without revealing the Rinnegan, saving Kakashi and forcing the Sannin to confront the undeniable efficiency of his 'New Order' architecture.
Itachi surgically neutralized Raikage A without utilizing his bloodline limits, saving Kakashi and leaving the Sannin in a state of profound, fearful amazement at his impossible efficiency.
The Sannin and the Cloud vanguard witnessed Itachi's surgical neutralization of Raikage A, forcing a realization of their own existential powerlessness against his passive sovereignty.

Itachi surgically neutralized Raikage A without bloodline arts and attempted to merge with the 9 Tailed Beasts at Naka Shrine, reaching the threshold of divinity but failing to anchor the Rinne-Sharingan due to a missing world-tier catalyst.

rumors.content: The Uchiha 'High Advisor' is just a title to keep the old legends happy; the children are the real power now.
There's a hole in the sky above the Gedo Ravine that only opens for those who have no heart.
The 'Dual Inheritors' have entered a state of sacred fasting to prepare for a continental audit.
The High Advisor is secretly writing a book of peace that will end the need for kunai forever.
The 'Dual Inheritors' are the real Sages of the Leaf; High Advisor Itachi is just their administrative shadow.
The 'Dual Inheritors' are the ones really in charge now; the Hokage is just a figurehead for their power.
The Dual Inheritors have outgrown the Wings; the Uchiha's third generation is the true master of the fire.
The Dual Inheritors have outgrown the Wings; the Leaf has four gods now, yet the eldest brother remains in the garden.
The Stone Tsuchikage is calling for an emergency council to discuss the 'Resonant Anomaly' seen in the north.
Some say the High Advisor's children are the only ones with the stomach to do what's necessary; their father is just a shadow of their light.
The 'Dual Ascendants' are not human; they are weapons made of starlight and blood.
The 'Black Sun' has unmasked at the Three Pillars; the stars themselves bowed to the Uchiha.
The 'Black Sun' myth was a lie; the truth is that the Uchiha Advisor is a ghost who can delete a Raikage with a blink.
The Hidden Stone is preparing to offer a total vassalage agreement to the Leaf to avoid the Sage's further attention.
The 'Black Sun' was never a ghost story; the Stone Commander says he saw a man delete a dragon with a blink.
The Dual Inheritors are stronger than the Wings, but even they bow to the shadow of the Advisor.
The 'Dual Wings' aren't retired; they've been moved to the shadows to wait for the Coalition's next mistake.
The High Advisor's eyes at the Three Pillars weren't just Sharingan; some say the world itself stopped breathing when he looked at them.
The High Advisor is an invincible ghost who no longer needs a blade to bleed the world.
The Empress has forgotten the name of the garden she was born in; the sun is the only family she recognizes now.
The 'Eye in the Moon' is not a myth; the stars themselves seem to blink with the rhythm of the Sage's breath.
The High Advisor is the one who truly holds the moon in the sky; the silence we hear is his heartbeat.
The Imperial Districts are safer than the Hidden Villages ever were, but some say the ground feels heavier than it did before the Expansion.
The High Advisor's eyes flare like the sun when the Citadel doors are closed; he is more than a tactician.
They say the Mizukage wept when he saw the first Mist-Wraith ship return to civilian trade colors.
The Uchiha 'Advisor' is seen more often in his garden than on the borders; some wonder if the deterrent is even necessary anymore.
They say 'ghosts' are walking the market square, and even the police force's eyes can't see them.
The Stone's engineers are building a city of glass where no shadow can hide; they say even the Uchiha will be blind within its walls.
The sea at the Port of Haze went perfectly still for a single heartbeat, as if the world forgot how to move.
The High Advisor's children have not been seen in public for seven years; some say they have ascended to a higher plane.
The 'Black Sun' didn't set; it just gave birth to two new stars. The ripples have returned.
The stars themselves shivered for a moment tonight; some say the Sage has finally decided to rewrite the sky.
The stars briefly pulsed with a lavender light tonight; some say the Sage has finally finished his garden.

planning_block.thinking: The Otsutsuki are free, and the Pan-Substrate has been quiet for twenty-five years. I have achieved the absolute 'Stillness' I sought. However, a Sovereign Mirror—a Rank #1 version of myself who embraced the Void—has manifested to challenge my Logic. It has targeted Sayuri in the Land of Iron. I must neutralize this Peer Siege without revealing the full Tier 4 unmasking to the village, or risk deleting the autonomy I have spent a century preserving.
